---
title: "CV"
---

## Download Resume

<a class="button" href="files/Yijing_Sun_Resume.pdf" download>
Download PDF Resume
</a>

<br><br>

<div class="section-card">

<h2>Yijing Sun</h2>

<p><strong>Email:</strong> yijing.sun@emory.edu  
<strong>Phone:</strong> +1 (404)-205-3056</p>

</div>

<div class="section-card">

<h3>Education</h3>

<p>
<strong>Emory University, Rollins School of Public Health</strong><br>
Master of Public Health (Health Policy & Management), Data Science Certificate<br>
2024 – 2026
</p>

<p>
<strong>University of Toronto</strong><br>
Bachelor of Science, Immunology<br>
2019 – 2023
</p>

</div>

<div class="section-card">

<h3>Academic Experience</h3>

<p>
<strong>Support Networks and Problem Solving Among Older Adults Experiencing Self-Neglect</strong><br>
Conducted quantitative and qualitative analysis on elder abuse data, including data cleaning, normalization, and visualization.
</p>

<p>
<strong>NLP to Identify Adults Aging Solo Using EMR Data</strong><br>
Performed EMR chart review and extracted linguistic indicators to support model development.
</p>

</div>

<div class="section-card">

<h3>Professional Experience</h3>

<p>
<strong>Teaching Assistant – Emory University</strong><br>
Supported instruction for R programming and data analysis, assisting students with coding and statistical concepts.
</p>

<p>
<strong>IQVIA – Clinical Operations Internship</strong><br>
Assisted in clinical trial inspection preparation and analysis of regulatory documentation.
</p>

</div>

<div class="section-card">

<h3>Skills</h3>

<ul>
<li>R, Python, SQL, SAS</li>
<li>Data visualization and statistical modeling</li>
<li>Health policy and economic evaluation</li>
<li>Bilingual: English & Chinese</li>
</ul>

</div>
